## index.html — exact sections to RESTORE (from the original baseline; re-typeset into the new premium design, do NOT paste old markup)
Compare with `git show handover-gemini-baseline:index.html`. The rewrite dropped, restore ALL:
- **Persona / "a deadline that matters to you"** audience band (per-segment urgency)
- **"Built for the UK teams under the most regulatory pressure"** — use-case cards
- **Real-product carousel** "The real product, not a mockup" — ≥3 real shots (cyber-overview, cash-overview, mark-overview, core-properties)
- **"Every output traces back to its source"** — methodology / statute-citation grid
- **"Six rule-sets, one platform"** — frameworks strip
- **Free-tools section** + ALL tool links: /tools/cyber-essentials-readiness, /tools/ppn-002-calculator, /tools/late-payment-calculator, /tools/mees-risk-snapshot, /tools/vsme-materiality-light, /csrd
- **"The regulatory pressure UK organisations face today"** — stat cards (real figures, cited)
- **"From complex regulations to clear action plans"** — the 4-step HOW-IT-WORKS workflows for each product (postcode→gap→retrofit→report; profile→measures→narrative→evidence; connect→assess→track→submit; import→chase→score→recover; headcount→turnover→verdict; frameworks→materiality→report)
- **ALL SIX products** restored as cards: CrowCyber, CrowCash, CrowMark, **CrowAgent Core**, **CrowESG (coming Q3 2026)**, **CSRD Checker** + their links (/crowagent-core, /crowesg, /csrd, /crowcash)
- **"Twelve sectors"** — restore all 12 sector cards (currently 3)
- **"Operational standards buyers expect"** — trust section (UK infra, statute-accurate, reliability, API-first, UK support, AI narratives)
- **"Every compliance engine, available via API"** — developers section
- GTM hierarchy: Cyber/Cash/Mark most prominent; Core = "platform foundation"; ESG = "coming Q3 2026"; free tools prominent.

Elevate ALL of it with the premium visual + motion system. Target for index.html: ≥80% word parity (≈2630+ words) AND `node tests/_guard.js index.html` = PASS.
